title: LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS - 211info
text: WHITE BIRD CLINIC LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects people to housing programs, including shelter information, other housing resources, tenant support, and non-housing resources. Does not provide emergency housing or rental assistance, and there may be a waitlist. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals age 18 and older or families with minor children who are homeless or at risk of becoming homeless Hours: Monday/Friday 10am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-1295 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown on 12th Avenue between High Street and Mill Street Services: Housing Related Coordinated Entry Housing Related Coordinated Entry * Homeless Families Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NEST MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CAHOOTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS COUNSELING HOTLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WHITE BIRD CLINIC
